title: Graph
description: A materialized, versioned snapshot of the Agent-Fabric ecosystem graph: a set of entities (nodes) and relations (edges) plus a watermark describing how current the snapshot is.

@context.description: JSON-LD context. Reference the canonical Agent-Fabric context.

scope.description: Optional workspace this snapshot is partitioned to.

watermark.description: Real-time currency marker. Consumers can compare watermarks to detect staleness and to resume an event stream.

sequence.description: Last GraphEvent sequence number folded into this snapshot.

stream.description: Identifier of the event stream this snapshot was built from.

nodes.description: Entities in the snapshot, each validated against its concrete node-kind schema.
